residents_comments: appreciate everything all the staff at Attick Towers are doing for the residents
executive_directors_report: Bond bill for the fire system
Appropriations bill for $2.5 MI sponsored by Glenn Ivey was not accepted
Appropriations bill for FY2026 for $325K was approved
decisions: Motion to approve the agenda as submitted (passed 4-0)
Motion to approve financial reports for April 30, 2025 (passed 4-0)
Motion to approve minutes from the April 24, 2025 Regular Monthly Meeting (passed 4-0)
Motion to approve the payment of invoices submitted over $4,000 (passed 4-0)
Motion to adjourn the regular monthly meeting (passed 3-0)
